variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating section above financial lines. Given selected parent row '[Income Statement] Cost of sales', D&A is assumed embedded; nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A, administrative, selling, or R&D appears in the operating section above financial lines. With selected parent rows '[Income Statement] Research and development expenses' and '[Income Statement] Selling and administrative expenses', D&A is assumed embedded; nothing should be added separately.
